title: [YTP] Kyon's Awful Christmas
description:
Upon hearing that Kyon doesn't believe in Santa, Mario sends his minion Ryoko Asakura to kill him.  She then proceeds to freeze up right before killing him.  She must be running on Vista.  Meanwhile, other people do...Christmas...stuff.

(sorry for getting it in kind of late!  at least it's still christmas, right!?)
